guide: [Guide]ActiveText now shows [b]bold[/b], [i]italic[/i], [u]underline[/u], [strike]strike[/strike], [s=30]large text[/s], [mat id=demo/active_text_glow]glowing material text[/mat], [shader v=demo/active_text_glow_shader f=demo/active_text_glow_shader]direct shader glow[/shader], and [c=#bed]colored text[/c]. Effects: [a1 e=f f=linear t=1 l=0,0,1]fade[/a1], [a1 e=fa f=linear t=1 v=70 l=0,0,1]fade across[/a1], [a1 e=p f=linear t=0.8 v=0.45 l=0,0,1]pop[/a1], [a1 e=n v=3 s=1]nod[/a1], [a1 e=s v=3 s=1]shake[/a1], [a1 e=t v=0.8 s=1]tremble[/a1], [a1 e=g s=1]glow[/a1], [a1 e=test f=linear t=1 l=0,0,1]test[/a1]. Playback: this page reveals, fades in, and shows a direct-rendered prompt after completion.[p]This second local page appears only after continue, proving page segmentation and prompt click handling. [a1 w=1]This wait span also creates a local page stop.[/a1]Final local page after wait-for-click. And the text continues until it finally wraps to the next line just to see if it [s=40]works[/s] properly.
